title: sorbus alnifolia var. typica
intro: Sorbus alnifolia var. typica, also known as the Korean Whitebeam, is a deciduous shrub or small tree native to Korea. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities, making it effective in treating various health issues. The plant is rich in flavonoids, phenolic acids, and terpenoids, which contribute to its health benefits, such as antioxidant, anti-cancer, and cardiovascular-protective effects. Sorbus alnifolia var. typica is traditionally used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and decoctions, to treat respiratory issues, fever, and digestive problems.
